CHANGELOG ========= 7.1 --- * Add support for `:is()` * Add support for `:where()` 6.3 --- * Add support for `:scope` 4.4.0 ----- * Added support for `*:only-of-type` 2.8.0 ----- * Added the `CssSelectorConverter` class as a non-static API for the component. * Deprecated the `CssSelector` static API of the component. 2.1.0 ----- * none
